name: io.github.energio-es/holded-mcp
description: MCP server for Holded — invoicing, accounting, CRM, projects, and team

environmentVariables.name: HOLDED_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Holded API key. Get it from https://app.holded.com/api

environmentVariables.name: HOLDED_MODULES
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of modules to enable (invoicing, crm, projects, accounting, team). All enabled by default.

environmentVariables.name: HOLDED_RATE_LIMIT_PER_SECOND
environmentVariables.description: API rate limit in requests per second. Default: 10.

environmentVariables.name: HOLDED_DEBUG
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to enable debug logging for API requests.
